name: Design study methodology: Reflections from the trenches and the stacks

milestones.name: Identify and Evaluate Potential Domain Collaborations
Select Viable Collaboration and Problem Context
Define Roles: Front-line Analysts and Gatekeepers
Characterize Domain Problems and Abstract Tasks
Iteratively Refine Problem and Data Abstractions
Design Visualization Encodings and Interaction Concepts
Prototype, Implement, and Integrate with Workflows
Deploy System and Conduct In-the-Wild Evaluation
Reflect on Findings and Articulate Research Contributions
